Why Prime Meridian
Precision Logistics Starts With the Right Information.
Our operations team reviews every submission personally. No automated pricing engines — every quote is built by a logistics coordinator who understands your specific requirements.
  • 48-Hour Response GuaranteeDetailed quote within two business days, always.
  • Custom Pricing, No TemplatesBuilt from your actual origin, cargo, and timeline.
  • Coordinator Follow-UpA dedicated coordinator contacts you before finalizing.
  • Domestic & InternationalUS-wide coverage and 120+ country international reach.
  • Commercial AccountsPreferred pricing and dedicated support for ongoing clients.

Who We Are

Integrated Logistics Infrastructure

Prime Meridian Logistics LLC provides moving, storage, freight coordination, import/export logistics, and supply-chain support for residential and commercial clients across domestic and international markets.

We operate with operational precision across every vertical — from a single-apartment local move to a multi-container China-to-USA freight engagement. Every shipment is backed by licensed, insured, and compliance-verified infrastructure.

Get a Quote → Import / Export Services
NA TO USA -->
International Trade Logistics

China-to-USA Logistics Coordination

End-to-end coordination from factory floor to US warehouse, Amazon fulfillment, or retail distribution.

01
Factory Pickup & Consolidation
Supplier pickup from any major Chinese manufacturing hub — Shenzhen, Guangzhou, Yiwu, Shanghai. We coordinate pickup scheduling, cargo inspection, and consolidation at origin port.
02
Ocean Freight Booking
Competitive LCL and FCL ocean freight rates through our carrier network. Full container and groupage shipments with weekly sailing schedules from major Chinese ports.
03
Customs Coordination
US Customs clearance, ISF filing, bond management, HTS classification, and compliance documentation via our licensed brokerage partners.
04
Port Drayage & Inland
Container drayage from LA/Long Beach, New York, or Savannah to your warehouse, distribution center, or Amazon prep facility.
05
Amazon Prep & Distribution
FBA prep services: labeling, poly bagging, carton forwarding, multi-channel fulfillment. We help Amazon sellers get product to shelves faster.
Factory Pickup
Supplier coordination from any major Chinese manufacturing city. Door-to-port handling.
Ocean Freight
LCL and FCL options with major carrier partnerships and competitive transit times.
Customs Clearance
Full ISF filing, bond management, HTS classification, and licensed broker coordination.
Amazon FBA Prep
Labeling, poly bag, carton forwarding — compliant with all Amazon inbound requirements.
Air Freight Option
Express air freight for time-sensitive cargo. 5–8 day door-to-door transit available.
Full Tracking
Real-time milestone updates from origin factory to final US delivery point.
